example_tasks: Create a table for budget comparison
Partition the hard drive for backups
Align team goals with quarterly objectives
Design the layout for the new dashboard
Define the column structure for the CSV export
Arrange items in the inventory spreadsheet
Organize the research notes by topic
Set up the grid for the design mockup
reasoning: The icon represents structure, organization, and tabular data. It is highly effective for tasks involving sorting, categorizing, or managing structured information, though it is too abstract for general action-oriented tasks.
